name: Policy Sensorium (CBS)
description: Springdrift-inspired CBS: injects <openclaw_state> before each LLM call. D' = Σ(w·mag)/(max_weight×1.0×n). Signals: success_rate (w=0.30), tool_success (w=0.25), cbr_hit (w=0.20), severity_inversion (w=0.25). D' bands: <0.35 LOW_ACCEPT, 0.35–0.55 MEDIUM_CONFIRM, ≥0.55 HIGH_REJECT.

sensoriumWindow.description: Number of recent cycles to consider for metrics

dGateThreshold.description: D' threshold below which actions are gated

dBandHigh.description: D' above or equal to this value → HIGH_REJECT

severityRules.description: Ordered severity classification rules (first match wins)

sensoriumWindow.label: CBS Sensorium Window
sensoriumWindow.help: Number of recent cognitive cycles to consider for CBS signal computation

dBandLow.label: D' Low Band Threshold
dBandLow.help: D' below this value → LOW_ACCEPT (fast path)

dBandHigh.label: D' High Band Threshold
dBandHigh.help: D' at or above this value → HIGH_REJECT (block)

weightSuccess.label: Weight: Success Rate
weightSuccess.help: Weight for session success rate signal

weightTool.label: Weight: Tool Success
weightTool.help: Weight for tool failure rate signal

weightCbr.label: Weight: CBR Hit Rate
weightCbr.help: Weight for case-based reasoning hit rate signal

weightSeverity.label: Weight: Severity Inversion
weightSeverity.help: Weight for severity inversion signal (1 - avg_severity/1000)

severityRules.label: Severity Rules
severityRules.help: Ordered list of keyword → severity score mappings (first match wins)
